name: Rusted Short Sword
description: A neglected blade that remains better than bare hands.

name: Worn Pitchfork
description: A farm tool sturdy enough to keep danger at arm's length.

name: Carpenter's Hammer
description: A balanced crafting hammer with a solid iron head.

name: Oak Walking Staff
description: A stout staff polished smooth by years of travel.

name: Chipped Bottle
description: A broken bottle held by its cloth-wrapped neck.

name: Patched Leather Vest
description: Old leather armor reinforced with mismatched patches.

name: Linen Wrap
description: Layered linen offering light protection.

name: Minor Healing Potion
description: A bitter red tonic that closes small wounds.

name: Minor Focus Potion
description: A sharp herbal draught that clears the mind.

name: Turnip Seeds
description: Hardy seeds suited to novice growers.

name: Flax Seeds
description: Small seeds that grow into useful fiber plants.

name: Moonbean Seeds
description: Pale seeds that thrive beneath moonlight.

name: Turnip
description: A plain but dependable root vegetable.

name: Flax Fiber
description: Clean plant fibers ready to be spun or woven.

name: Moonbean
description: A faintly luminous bean with restorative properties.

name: Wood Scraps
description: Dry pieces of workable timber.

name: Hardwood
description: Dense timber cut from an old-growth tree.

name: Iron Ore
description: A heavy stone threaded with usable iron.

name: Wild Herbs
description: A fragrant bundle used in simple remedies.

name: Spider Silk
description: Strong, flexible strands harvested from a giant spider.

name: Boar Hide
description: A thick hide suitable for rugged leatherwork.

name: Verdant Field Notes
description: A scholar's observations on the strange growth of the Expanse.

name: Gardener's Journal Page
description: A torn page describing voices beneath the garden soil.

name: Old Ranger's Map
description: A weathered map showing paths no longer found in the Deep Woods.

name: Stale Ale
description: Flat, warm, and only technically drinkable.

name: Pocket Lint
description: A mysterious collection of fibers and crumbs.

name: Bent Copper Coin
description: A defaced coin rejected by most merchants.
